The main application deadline for most programmes for 2027 entry is 1 October 2026.
The main basis for admission to the RCM is your performance at audition, whether by video or in person.
Overseas audition candidates at high-demand venues must submit a pre-screening video by the application deadline.
Applicants should prepare all of the repertoire listed for their principal study and chosen level.
